'''âg-w-f''' ('''gawafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:webcrawl|webcrawl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:webcrawl|webcrawl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-w-f
|-
! Lemma
| gawafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gawafithi|gawafithi]] || [[word:gawafiji|gawafiji]] || [[word:gawafishi|gawafishi]] || [[word:gawafi|gawafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawafuthuth|gawafuthuth]] || [[word:gawafujuj|gawafujuj]] || [[word:gawafushush|gawafushush]] || [[word:gawaf|gawaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawafuthu|gawafuthu]] || [[word:gawafuju|gawafuju]] || [[word:gawafushu|gawafushu]] || [[word:gawafu|gawafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawafufuth|gawafufuth]] || [[word:gawafufuj|gawafufuj]] || [[word:gawafufush|gawafufush]] || [[word:gawafuf|gawafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gawafethe|gawafethe]] || [[word:gawafeje|gawafeje]] || [[word:gawafeshe|gawafeshe]] || [[word:gawafe|gawafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawafothoth|gawafothoth]] || [[word:gawafojoj|gawafojoj]] || [[word:gawafoshosh|gawafoshosh]] || [[word:gawaf|gawaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawafotho|gawafotho]] || [[word:gawafojo|gawafojo]] || [[word:gawafosho|gawafosho]] || [[word:gawafo|gawafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawafofoth|gawafofoth]] || [[word:gawafofoj|gawafofoj]] || [[word:gawafofosh|gawafofosh]] || [[word:gawafof|gawafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gawafĂŠthĂŠ|gawafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gawafĂŠjĂŠ|gawafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gawafĂŠshĂŠ|gawafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gawafĂŠ|gawafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawafathath|gawafathath]] || [[word:gawafajaj|gawafajaj]] || [[word:gawafashash|gawafashash]] || [[word:gawaf|gawaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawafatha|gawafatha]] || [[word:gawafaja|gawafaja]] || [[word:gawafasha|gawafasha]] || [[word:gawafa|gawafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawafafath|gawafafath]] || [[word:gawafafaj|gawafafaj]] || [[word:gawafafash|gawafafash]] || [[word:gawafaf|gawafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gawafasha|gawafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogawafasha|gogawafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigawafasha|gokigawafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gawafnĂŒsha|gawafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogawafnknĂŒsha|gogawafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigawafnĂŒsha|gokigawafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gawafshĂ«sha|gawafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogawafnkshĂ«sha|gogawafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigawafshĂ«sha|gokigawafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gawafrosha|gawafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogawafnkrosha|gogawafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigawafrosha|gokigawafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gawafmusha|gawafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogawafnkmusha|gogawafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawafmusha|gokigawafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gawafsherasha|gawafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogawafnksherasha|gogawafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigawafsherasha|gokigawafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gawafngasha|gawafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogawafnkngasha|gogawafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigawafngasha|gokigawafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gawafyasha|gawafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogawafnkyasha|gogawafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigawafyasha|gokigawafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gawafyamasha|gawafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogawafnkyamasha|gogawafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigawafyamasha|gokigawafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gawafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gawafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogawafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogawafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigawafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigawafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gawafnĂŒrosha|gawafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogawafnknĂŒrosha|gogawafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigawafnĂŒrosha|gokigawafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawafnĂŒmusha|gawafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogawafnknĂŒmusha|gogawafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawafnĂŒmusha|gokigawafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gawafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gawafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogawafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogawafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigawafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigawafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gawafshĂ«rosha|gawafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogawafnkshĂ«rosha|gogawafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigawafshĂ«rosha|gokigawafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawafshĂ«musha|gawafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogawafnkshĂ«musha|gogawafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawafshĂ«musha|gokigawafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gawafronĂŒsha|gawafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogawafnkronĂŒsha|gogawafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigawafronĂŒsha|gokigawafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gawafroshĂ«sha|gawafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogawafnkroshĂ«sha|gogawafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigawafroshĂ«sha|gokigawafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawafromusha|gawafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogawafnkromusha|gogawafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawafromusha|gokigawafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gawafmunĂŒsha|gawafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogawafnkmunĂŒsha|gogawafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigawafmunĂŒsha|gokigawafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gawafmushĂ«sha|gawafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogawafnkmushĂ«sha|gogawafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigawafmushĂ«sha|gokigawafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gawafmurosha|gawafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogawafnkmurosha|gogawafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigawafmurosha|gokigawafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gawaf|gawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠf|gĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogawaf|hogawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠwĂŠf|hogĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogawaf|hohogawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠwĂŠf|hohogĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgawaf|nĂŒgawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠwĂŠf|nĂŒgĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgawaf|nĂŒnĂŒgawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠwĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgawaf|nĂŻgawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠwĂŠf|nĂŻgĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgawaf|nĂŻnĂŻgawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠwĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugawaf|lugawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠwĂŠf|lugĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugawaf|lulugawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠwĂŠf|lulugĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligawaf|ligawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠwĂŠf|ligĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligawaf|liligawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠwĂŠf|liligĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogawaf|kogawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠwĂŠf|kogĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogawaf|kokogawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠwĂŠf|kokogĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegawaf|kegawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠwĂŠf|kegĂŠwĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegawaf|kekegawaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠwĂŠf|kekegĂŠwĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
